name: Another Chicken Fried Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Boneless beef cut (cut into 4 serving pieces)
2 tbsp Fresh parsley chopped (or 2 tsp. dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound steaks to about 1/4 inch thickness.
2. Rub both sides with salt, pepper, paprika, and garlic powder.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet; the oil should be about 1/4 inch deep.
4. Beat egg and milk together in a bowl.
5. In another bowl, season flour with salt, pepper, paprika, and garlic powder.
6. When the oil is hot, dredge steaks in the flour, then in the egg mixture, then back in the flour.
7. Place them immediately in the skillet.
8. Fry on both sides until golden brown. Remove and set aside.
9. Remove most of the oil from the skillet, leaving behind the bits of meat etc.
10. Reheat the oil and add onion. Cook until golden.
11. Add about 3 tbsp. flour, whisking it in.
12. Gradually whisk in chicken broth, scraping the bottom well; add a little water if needed to thin consistency.
13. Bring to boil then add cream and parsley, cooking another minute.
14. Serve with mashed potatoes, corn bread, or biscuits.
